Defines the built-in properties and routines for the Error.prototype object in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines the properties and routines for the `Error.prototype` object in a JavaScript engine. It uses macros to declare object identifiers, string values, object values, and routines associated with the `Error.prototype`. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns an identifier to the `Error.prototype`, while the `OBJECT_VALUE` and `STRING_VALUE` macros define properties such as `constructor`, `name`, and `message` with specific attributes. The `ROUTINE` macro specifies a method, `toString`, associated with the `Error.prototype`, including its C function implementation and argument details. The file uses conditional compilation to ensure that these macros are defined only if they are not already defined, and it concludes by undefining them to prevent conflicts.
